examples: And yes, we are prepared to work with the EGAD states and the AU in finding solutions to the problem of Somalia, he said.
But as Vaughn-Nichols points out, that may change with Office 2007, and let's not forget that the "Start" button no longer has the word "Start" on it in Vista. Egad!
Egad Jens, we've got your back on this one!
